title: pentaphylloides arbuscula
intro: Pentaphylloides arbuscula, also known as the alpine cinquefoil, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and improving digestion. Pentaphylloides arbuscula is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for its medicinal uses.
